sp_widget.name: IncentNow Admin Dashboard
sp_widget.template:
Administration

Manage fiscal calendars, periods, lookup tables and data imports

Fiscal Calendar & Periods

Create fiscal calendars with auto-generated quarters and months

Lookup Tables

Manage commission rate and bonus tables

System Settings

Configure default settings, and global preferences

Import Data (External)

Upload and import data files into the system

Import Data (Internal)

Upload and import data files into the system from ServiceNow
